scope.target: Parameterize active guides and remove historical source-project facts and unsafe credential defaults.
constraints: Preserve GWT, BDDfy default/opt-out, and optional .feature policy.
Use target evidence and secret-source references instead of invented values.

steps: Remove current-project assertions and source-project names.
Replace fixed paths, profiles, providers, versions, ports, and schemas with conditional examples or evidence placeholders.
Remove literal credential recommendations and require secrets/configuration sources.
Synchronize index descriptions only where necessary and validate targeted searches.
validation: targeted stale-truth, name, frontend, and credential searches
execution.last_completed_step: Rewrote the three primary guides as evidence-driven reusable guidance and removed historical names, fixed profiles, frontend versions, database defaults, and literal credentials.
execution.next_action: Commit the validated AICR-002 checkpoint, then begin AICR-003 wrapper metadata contract remediation.

results.summary: Resolved CTX-H-002 by parameterizing active guides and requiring target-repository evidence and secret references.
tests_run: targeted stale-truth, source-name, fixed-profile, frontend-version, and credential searches (no matches)
results.residual_risk: Target repositories must still supply and validate their own profile, deployment, and secret evidence during adoption.
